tenant.branch_code_not_unique: Branch code must be unique inside the tenant.
tenant.branch_active: Cannot remove an active branch. Deactivate it first.
value_object.email_required: A valid email address is required.
value_object.date_range_invalid: End date cannot be earlier than start date.
error.authentication.required: The operation could not be completed because you must sign in again.
error.authorization.forbidden: The operation could not be completed because you do not have sufficient permission. Request access from an administrator.
error.resource.not_found: The operation could not be completed because the requested record does not exist or is no longer available.
error.operation.conflict: The operation could not be completed because the record changed or conflicts with a current rule. Refresh the information and try again.
error.validation.invalid: The operation could not be completed because one or more fields are invalid. Review the entered data and try again.
error.request.invalid: The operation could not be completed because the request contains invalid data. Review the information and try again.
error.unexpected: The operation could not be completed due to an unexpected error. Try again later.
system_suite.module.suite_required: The module could not be registered because you must select a system suite.
system_suite.module.code_required: The module could not be registered because the Code field is required. Enter a valid code.
system_suite.module.code_too_long: The module could not be registered because the Code field exceeds the 50-character maximum. Shorten it and try again.
system_suite.module.code_invalid_format: The module could not be registered because the Code field has an invalid format. Use letters, numbers, and underscores only, for example REPORTS_01. Entered value: {0}.
system_suite.module.name_required: The module could not be registered because the Name field is required. Enter a name.
system_suite.module.name_too_long: The module could not be registered because the Name field exceeds the 150-character maximum. Shorten it and try again.
system_suite.module.description_too_long: The module could not be registered because the Description field exceeds the 500-character maximum. Shorten it and try again.
system_suite.module.sort_order_invalid: The module could not be registered because the Order field must be a positive integer. Enter a number greater than zero.
system_suite.module.code_not_unique: The module could not be registered because another module already uses the same Code. Enter a different code.
